nasb.text: So they came near to Joseph’s house steward, and spoke to him at the entrance of the house,

esv.text: So they went up to the steward of Joseph’s house and spoke with him at the door of the house,

cnv.text: 他們於是走近約瑟的管家，在屋門口與他說話。

ccb.text: 他们走到约瑟的管家跟前，在房门口对他说：

csbs.text: 他们就挨近约瑟的管家，在屋门口与他说话。
